# Construction Budget

## Total Budget: $450,000

Budget prepared by Jim Patterson (Lone Star Builders) and approved by James and Emily Patterson on February 1, 2026. Contingency of 8% ($36,000) is included for unforeseen costs.

## Cost Breakdown by Category

| Category | Budget | Actual (to date) | Status |
|----------|--------|------------------|--------|
| Site Preparation & Excavation | $12,000 | $11,200 | Complete |
| Foundation (post-tensioned slab) | $45,000 | $43,800 | Complete |
| Framing (lumber + labor) | $65,000 | $21,159 (materials) | In progress |
| Roofing (standing seam metal) | $30,000 | — | Not started |
| Electrical (Bright Spark Electric) | $25,000 | $7,500 (deposit) | Not started |
| Plumbing (rough + fixtures) | $20,000 | $4,572 (fixtures ordered) | Not started |
| HVAC (Comfort Air Solutions) | $18,000 | — | Not started |
| Insulation (spray foam) | $12,000 | — | Not started |
| Drywall & Interior Finish | $22,000 | — | Not started |
| Windows & Exterior Doors | $28,000 | — | Not started |
| Flooring (hardwood + tile) | $18,000 | — | Not started |
| Cabinetry & Countertops | $25,000 | — | Not started |
| Painting (interior + exterior) | $8,000 | — | Not started |
| Exterior (siding, stone, landscaping) | $35,000 | — | Not started |
| Permits & Fees | $7,000 | $6,340 | Mostly complete |
| Architectural & Engineering | $22,000 | $22,000 | Complete |
| Contingency (8%) | $36,000 | — | Reserve |
| General Contractor Fee (10%) | $42,000 | $10,500 (25% draw) | Ongoing |

## Notes

- Foundation came in $1,200 under budget due to fewer post-tension cables needed than estimated.
- Lumber savings of $1,800 from Hill Country Lumber bulk discount.
- Emily wants to add a $4,800 triple-pane window upgrade on the west wall. If approved, it will come from contingency.
- The HVAC quote from Comfort Air Solutions is firm through June 30, 2026.
